case_title: BAY CLEANING SOLUTIONS, LLC VS. ICULINAIRE LLC, DBA 3RD COUSIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY CLEANING SOLUTIONS, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-03-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BAY CLEANING SOLUTIONS, LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM JOHNSON, PRESIDENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK; J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BAY CLEANING SOLUTIONS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ICULINAIRE LLC, DBA 3RD COUSIN LUTES, GREG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY CLEANING SOLUTIONS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LUTES, GREG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED DEC-05-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUTES, GREG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED DEC-06-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ICULINAIRE LLC, DBA 3RD COUSIN
NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY CLEANING SOLUTIONS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ICULINAIRE LLC, DBA 3RD COUSIN
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL NO APPEARANCES; (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
